title: Design Twitter
pattern: Design â€” Heap + Hashmap for Feed Generation
coreIdea: Design a simplified Twitter supporting posting tweets, following/unfollowing, and retrieving the 10 most recent tweets from a user's feed (self + followees), using a global timestamp counter and a max-heap to merge recent tweets across followed users.
recognitionCues: asks to design a social feed / news feed system
requires merging multiple users' timestamped items and returning most recent k
approach: Store each user's tweets as a list of (timestamp, tweetId), and a set of followees per user. For getNewsFeed, gather the most recent tweets from the user and all followees, push them into a max-heap by timestamp, pop the top 10.
timeComplexity: O(k log(f)) for feed retrieval where f is number of followees, k=10
